title: rubus littoralis
intro: Rubus littoralis, also known as the beach raspberry or coastal bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to coastal areas of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Rubus littoralis include its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Rubus littoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
